# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

---

## Type of Change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Repository maintenance
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Workflow update
- [ ] Other

---

## Description

Explain:

- What was changed?
- Why was the change necessary?
- What problem does it solve?

---

## Files Modified

List the primary files or directories affected.

Example:

- docs/computer-science/databases.md
- docs/programming/python.md
- mkdocs.yml

---

## Screenshots (Optional)

If the change affects documentation appearance or navigation, attach screenshots.

---

## Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

- [ ] Documentation builds successfully (`mkdocs build --strict`)
- [ ] Local preview verified (`mkdocs serve`)
- [ ] Markdown formatting follows repository conventions
- [ ] Navigation updated (if new pages were added)
- [ ] Links have been verified
- [ ] Code examples have been tested (if applicable)
- [ ] No unnecessary files are included
- [ ] Spelling and grammar have been reviewed

---

## Breaking Changes

Does this change introduce any breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, explain below.

---

## Additional Notes

Include any additional information that reviewers should know before reviewing this pull request.
